data.body:
PLAN — Executing epic ce0e (baseborn-subtle-cricket): speed up gerrit-verify CI.
Tree: epic ce0e → 3 leaves, all CI-config/docs (no src/rebar logic):
  - story 8d36 (curricular-brickred-ratfish): pytest-xdist parallelization + coverage parallel=true combine fix + docs/coverage.md
  - task 9ad9 (stampable-doomed-fluke): --durations=25 per-test logging + .gitignore
  - task bad4 (darkish-melodious-cuscus): pip caching on setup-python steps
No blocks/depends_on among leaves; all three touch gerrit-verify.yaml + test.yml so they CANNOT be parallel worktrees — sequential Gerrit relation-chain stack.
Stack order (dependency-neutral, chosen to front-load the substantive coverage change): 8d36 -> 9ad9 -> bad4.

TDD SCALING DECISION: leaves are CI YAML/toml/docs, not application logic with edge cases to over-fit. Held-out subagent+withheld-edge-tests ceremony does not apply. Meaningful observable oracle = running the REAL commands locally (esp. proving coverage-combine under -n4 --cov with parallel=true yields correct TOTAL and no leaked .coverage.* files) + make lint/typecheck/test pre-flight + CI Verified +1 as ultimate gate. Will not manufacture change-detector YAML-parsing tests.

Landing: rebar/Gerrit flow (project docs win over CLAUDE.local direct-commit note). Stacked relation chain -> refs/for/main; close each leaf after its Verified +1; close epic; land via auto-lander.
Env: worktree .claude/worktrees/baseborn-cricket, branch epic/baseborn-cricket, from origin/main ee49b4a89. venv + commit-msg + pre-commit hooks installed. All 3 gates on (plan-review-claim, completion-verify-close, ticket-for-commit).
